message:
fix(cli): send JSON-mode errors to stdout instead of stderr

When --json flag is active, structured error responses (database_error,
serialization_error, not_found, etc.) should go to stdout so that JSON
consumers can capture them from a single stream. Non-JSON error messages
still use stderr for human-readable output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
